roles.core: central bot, finance, licenses, PasarGuard owner integration, central Plisio invoices and callbacks, central APIs, D1 authority and report processor fallback
roles.edge: web panels, reseller bots, customer miniapps, reseller Plisio invoices and callbacks, latency-sensitive request handling and immediate topic reports
roles.processor: report retries, topic repair, daily reports, backups and background jobs

features: fix report topic groups that were created successfully but received no activity reports
deliver normal central and reseller report events immediately without waiting for Processor Cron
retain the D1 outbox and retry path when Telegram delivery fails or a topic was deleted
invoke Processor business jobs from the Core scheduled handler as a fallback
flush report events queued by Processor jobs in the same run instead of waiting for the next Cron
add /test_reports and /flush_reports commands to central and reseller report groups
show pending queue count, last successful delivery and last report error in /reports_status
preserve Plisio, PasarGuard 5.1 API keys and the three-worker architecture

validation.javascript_syntax: passed for core, edge and processor
validation.immediate_delivery_unit_test: passed for central and reseller message_thread_id routing
validation.missing_forum_test: passed; unconfigured destinations are skipped without breaking user operations
validation.missing_topic_test: passed; events remain pending for Processor topic recreation and retry
validation.processor_fallback: static assertion passed for Core Cron and manual flush paths
validation.live_telegram_delivery: not run; no live bot token or report group was supplied
